race.description: G & K Looney Plastering Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: HOLD THIS (6) went under as a firm fav here when resuming two weeks ago. Fitter now and draws the A1 for McDougall. Can go one better. IKON PARK (7) is a locally trained Prized Icon gelding stepping out on debut. Strips fitter for two nice trials and gets the key booking of Loy. Bright start anticipated. KIP STAR (13) hasn't be far away in his first two starts back in CBR on the Acton. Peaking now and draws to get a lovely run under Keatings. Not taking lightly. DISTANT STRIPES (5) has bee knocking on the door for a while. Drawn awfully today but deserves safe keeping. BENNELONG DREAMS (2) is a Lonhro gelding on debut for the Donna Scott yard. Has come along nicely in his lead-up work and deserves respect, despite the wide draw.
